2606.05522.title: Exploring LLMs for South Asian Music Understanding and Generation
2606.05522.paper_summary: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promising results in music understanding and generation tasks. However, existing works remain confined to Western tonal traditions, offering little insight into whether current LLMs can handle structurally distinct low-resource musical traditions. We present the first systematic evaluation of LLM competence in South Asian classical music, a tradition governed by raga, tala-based melodic constraints that impose fundamentally different structural principles from Western harmony-driven music. We ground our evaluation in Hindustani classical theory and Bengali classical forms, including Rabindra and Nazrul Sangeet -- representative low-resource traditions within South Asian classical music. For music understanding evaluation, we introduce a 504-question-answer benchmark spanning raga grammar, cultural knowledge, and symbolic notation reasoning, evaluating 33 LLMs where frontier models such as Gemini 2.5 Pro achieve 85-90% accuracy, while most open-source models remain in the 23-40% range. For music generation, we design a five-level controlled prompting framework and find that even the strongest model produces stylistically faithful outputs only 40% of the time. These results reveal that structural validity and stylistic faithfulness in music generation are distinct objectives and highlight an open challenge for culturally grounded music modeling.
2606.05522.paper_summary_zh: 最近在大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展在音樂理解和生成任務中顯示出令人鼓舞的結果。<lb/>然而，現有的研究仍然局限於西方調性傳統，對於當前的LLMs是否能夠處理結構上截然不同的低資源音樂傳統幾乎沒有提供任何見解。<lb/>我們提出了對南亞古典音樂中LLM能力的首次系統評估，這一傳統受raga和基於tala的旋律約束所支配，這些約束與西方和聲驅動音樂的結構原則根本不同。<lb/>我們的評估基於印度斯坦古典理論和孟加拉古典形式，包括Rabindra和Nazrul Sangeet——南亞古典音樂中具有代表性的低資源傳統。<lb/>在音樂理解評估中，我們引入了一個包含504個問題的基準，涵蓋raga語法、文化知識和符號標記推理，評估了33個LLMs，其中前沿模型如Gemini 2.5 Pro達到了85-90%的準確率，而大多數開源模型則保持在23-40%的範圍內。<lb/>在音樂生成方面，我們設計了一個五級控制提示框架，發現即使是最強的模型，其產出的風格忠實度也僅有40%的時間。<lb/>這些結果揭示了音樂生成中的結構有效性和風格忠實性是不同的目標，並突顯了文化根植音樂建模的一個開放挑戰。
2606.05522.author: Faria Binte Kader et.al.
2606.05522.authors: Faria Binte Kader, Mohtasim Hadi Rafi, Shah Wasif Sajjad, Santu Karmaker
